findings.description: Form header layout altered from horizontal to vertical.
findings.evidence: In the PDF, the form fields for Legal Name, Account Number, etc., are arranged horizontally in segmented boxes. In the HTML, these are listed vertically as text labels.

In the PDF, the column header '(4)' spans across two sub-columns ('Original Dest...' and 'Revised Dest...'). In the HTML, this spanning header is removed, and '(4)' is duplicated in two separate, independent column headers.
